title: Same Tree
problem_statement: Determine if two binary trees are structurally identical and have the same node values.

examples.explanation: Both trees have the same structure and values.

constraints: The number of nodes is in the range [0, 100]
intuition: Recursively compare corresponding nodes and subtrees for equality.

approaches.name: Recursive tree comparison
approaches.description: Check if both nodes are null, then compare values and recurse on both left and right children.
approaches.why_not: Converting trees to strings is unnecessary and more error-prone.

interview_qa.a: Both nodes null is true; one null or mismatched values is false.
Recursively compare left with left and right with right.
